property.name: text1
property.value: * (A split in the road stands before you...)

property.name: text2
property.value: * (You're filled with the knowledge that you can't turn back.)

properties.property: Southeast: Flooded Sanctum South: Second Sanctuary
SUNKEN IN THE DEEP, YET BURNING WITH PROMISE.
Fuck you,[wait:5] there ain't anything here yet![wait:15] [font:main,48][color:red][shake:3]SCRAM!!!
Fuck you,[wait:5] there ain't anything here yet![wait:15] [font:main,48][color:red][shake:3]SCRAM!!!
* Ah... [wait:5]the Flooded Sanctum.[wait:5] * A tomb of salt and silence.

property.name: text2
property.value: * Some say it's filled with the glitter of oasis... [wait:5]others[wait:5], the sea of sins

properties.property: * But none truly knew the depths.[wait:5] * Down there,[wait:5] the memory drowns.
* Ah... [wait:5]the Second Sanctuary. [wait:5] * A base of dust and sparkles.

property.name: text2
property.value: * Some say it's filled with the shine of glasses... [wait:5]others,[wait:5] the weight of boredom.

properties.property: * But none truly knew the depths.[wait:5] * Down there, [wait:5]the purpose drowns.
